subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Dhabih! Ye are beneath the glance of the loving-kindness of your Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed. Know ye, then, the station of this exalted Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ذبیح انتم تحت لحاظ عنایه ربکم العلیم الخبیر ان اعرفوا مقام هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @firmness in the Covenant
